states.name: Viola
states.title: Traveler of Mysterious Fortune
states.description: The graduate of a school of magic, Viola took up the mantle of her father, an archeologist who vanished under mysterious circumstances, and wanders the world researching ancient religions. Her unassuming appearance masks a proactive and eccentric mind. Though she graduated top of her class, she prefers the thrill of the unknown to badges of merit.

states.name: Viola
states.title: Traveler of Mysterious Fortune
states.description: Viola's path is ever filled with unexpected twists and turns, but somehow she emerges from any turmoil intact, and having made some kind of incredible discovery. Whether this is a special talent or just supernatural luck is unclear, but those who get mixed up in her adventures are loath to repeat the experience.
